commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Very angry. This anger was a zeal against sin; and an indignation at the affront offered to God; like that which the same holy prophet conceived upon the sight of the golden calf, Exodus xxxii. 19. (Challoner)
Respect not. Hebrew, "thou wilt not have regard for their sacrifices "as long as they continue in these sentiments of pride and of rebellion. (Haydock)
Thou knowest. Hebrew, "I have not "
Ass. This expression is proverbial, 1 Kings xii. 3. The Samaritan and Septuagint read, chamod, "any thing desirable "instead of chamor, "an ass. "(Calmet)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Very angry: This anger was a zeal against sin; and an indignation at the affront offered to God; like that which the same holy prophet conceived upon the sight of the golden calf, Ex. 32. 19.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
